hard coal' is a fossil fuel with a calorific value of 27.91 MJ/kg. It is used as a solid fuel and is sourced from coal mines after crushing, screening and washing the coal. Its main applications are in the following sectors: domestic fuel (mainly for hand-fired stoves), as filter media and as an ingredient in charcoal briquettes.

Clay sediments are used in great variety, with the primary raw materials being loams, clays, marls, mudstone, shale, and slate together with smaller quantities of boulder clay, loess, and sand. They can contain all types of suitable clay minerals (layered silicates), such as illite, sericite, kaolinite, chlorite, and montmorillonite. The composition and particle size are the two principal factors that determine the nature of this product. The main component of the raw material clay is Kaolin. Kaolin approaches the formula of the mineral kaolinite (Al2O3.2SiO2.2H2O). Kaolins are primary clays formed by local decomposition of feldspar mineral.  Clay is mainly used for producing bricks. Other products with a porous structure are produced from raw materials including clay, e.g., face bricks, paving bricks, roofing tiles, drainage pipes, and cable conduits. Clinker, with its impervious or nearly impervious structure is produced mainly from shale and stoneware clays.

activity_name: market for impact extrusion of steel, hot, 4 strokes
reference_product_name: impact extrusion of steel, hot, 4 strokes
product_information: This is delivering the service of 'impact extrusion of steel, hot, 4 strokes'. Impact extrusion is a manufacturing process that the product is made out of metal slug. It is a type of pressure forming that take advantage of the change in hardness of materials under high pressure. A pressure force of typically 3.2 to 10 MN is applied which leads to yielding of the materials and a forming of the slug according to the mould`s shape. The use of multiple strokes it is possible to produce complex shapes. Hot impact extrusion is performed at temperature above the crystallisation point of the processed metal. This dataset represents hot impact extrusion of 1 kg of steel with 4 stroke. The service includes impact extrusion processes, production infrastructure, machinery but it excludes the steel input and the process of degreasing.

The product "quicklime, milled, loose" represents 1 kg of milled quicklime produced by crushing, milling, filtering (cyclone), dedusting, transport by conveyor belt and storage. Quicklime is produced by the thermal decomposition of limestone. It consists mainly of calcium oxide (CaO), but has other components such as silicon dioxide (SiO2) and magnesium oxide (MgO). Its quality depends on many factors, including physical properties, degree of sintering and chemical composition. As the most readily available and cost effective alkali, quicklime plays an essential part in a wide variety of industrial processes. The difference between clinker and quicklime used for products in the binding agent industry is mainly the calcination temperature which is a maximum of 1450ºC for clinker and a maximum of 1200ºC for quicklime.

The product "synthesis gas, 1 to 1" is a gaseous mixture of H2 and CO, which may include other compounds as impurities (e.g., H2O, CH4, and CO2). The product, synthesis gas, 1 to 1, represents gaseous mixtures with a hydrogen to carbon monoxide ratio of 1. Synthesis gas is a key chemical intermediate in many relevant processes including, but not limited to, the production of (i) methanol (ii) synthetic fuels via  Fischer-Tropsch synthesis, and (iii)  hydrogen. This product belongs to the sector of chemicals.

product_information: This is delivering the service of 'cast iron removed by turning, primarily roughing, conventional'. Turning is a chipping process where the piece of material is rotating while the cutting tool is not. It can be applied to both inside and outside of the piece to be machined and it is normally used to produce cylindrical shapes. It is performed in metals, wood and plastic materials. When the process is performed with roughing operation, then large amounts of materials are removed at once. The process is conventional, meaning that it is controlled manually and needs constant supervision. This dataset represents the turning of 1 kg of cast iron. The service includes materials input, production infrastructure, machinery and electricity consumption. Degreasing is not included and has to be added if necessary.

activity_name: market for magnesium, for reuse in titanium sponge production
reference_product_name: magnesium, for reuse in titanium sponge production
product_information: This product represents magnesium produced by the electrolysis of magnesium chloride according to the following reaction: MgCl2 -> Mg + Cl2. The magnesium chloride is obtained during the production of titanium sponge using the Kroll process, in the reduction and distillation step, described by the following reaction: TiCl4 + 2Mg -> Ti + 2MgCl2. Through the electrolysis of magnesium chloride, part of the Mg and Cl is recovered and then reused in the Kroll process. This product should not be used in any other context.

activity_name: market for impact extrusion of steel, hot, 5 strokes
reference_product_name: impact extrusion of steel, hot, 5 strokes
product_information: This is delivering the service of 'impact extrusion of steel, hot, 5 strokes'. Impact extrusion is a manufacturing process that the product is made out of metal slug. It is a type of pressure forming that take advantage of the change in hardness of materials under high pressure. A pressure force of typically 3.2 to 10 MN is applied which leads to yielding of the materials and a forming of the slug according to the mould`s shape. The use of multiple strokes it is possible to produce complex shapes. Hot impact extrusion is performed at temperature above the crystallisation point of the processed metal. This dataset represents hot impact extrusion of 1 kg of steel with 5 stroke. The service includes impact extrusion processes, production infrastructure, machinery but it excludes the steel input and the process of degreasing.

activity_name: market for impact extrusion of aluminium, deformation stroke
reference_product_name: impact extrusion of aluminium, deformation stroke
product_information: This is delivering the service of 'impact extrusion of aluminium, deformation stroke'. Impact extrusion is a manufacturing process that the product is made out of metal slug. It is a type of pressure forming that take advantage of the change in hardness of materials under high pressure. The use of multiple strokes is possible, to produce complex shapes. Strokes deformation is of minor importance when only a single stroke is needed. However, a piece with multiple strokes can significally increase the energy intensity of the process. This dataset represents the stroke deformation of 1 kg aluminium and it only includes the electricity consumption of the machine during the deformation .

activity_name: market for natural stone plate, polished
product_information: The product "natural stone plate, polished" represents a polished granite plate. For the polishing process it has been assumed that about 0.05 mm on each side of the plate is emitted as dust. The amount of dust per slab is therefore: (0.5 * 0.5 * 2 + 0.5 * 0.03 * 4) * 0.00005 = 0.000028 m3 or 0.077 kg and consequently, the amount of dust per kg of plate is 0.0037 kg. It is assumed that no cooling water is used in this process.

'pyrethroid-compound' represents an organic substance. The compounds fragment is Pyrethroids are mostly defined as pyrethroids based on their biological action, as they do not have common chemical structures. It is mostly solid (else liquid) under normal conditions of temperature and pressure. product_information: This is delivering the service of wood preservation with spray tunnel/deluging method. The service represents the surface treatment of dried wood with 1 kg of wood preservative for use class 3 (outdoor use with no ground contact) based on organic solvents in the automated spraying or deluging process. The process includes inputs of the wood preservative, electricity consumption, infrastructure and emissions. The input of wood is excluded and should be added manually. A similar application rate as used in the dipping/immersion method with an organic solvent-based preservative is assumed (200 g/m2). This means that for treating 1 m2 wood, 0.20 kg of this dataset is required.

The product "perlite" represents a natural glass that is usually black or gray, but sometimes brownish red. It has curved shrinkage cracks, and therefore breaks up into spheroidal granules. It is usually produced by rapid cooling of rhyolitic melts (rhyolite being the volcanic equivalent of granite). Being a glass, perlite contains few crystals and has a low water content. Naturally-occurring glasses containing 3 - 8 % water are known as pitchstone. Perlite is usually used in its expanded form.

activity_name: market for resin transfer moulding, light
product_information:
This is delivering the service of "resin transfer moulding, light".
Light resin transfer moulding (LRTM) is a low pressure moulding process, where a mixed resin and catalyst are injected into a closed mould containing a fibre pack or preform. When the resin has cured the mould can be opened and the finished component removed.
1 kg of this process corresponds to 0.86 kg of the final product at the end of the process. The converted amount of material (fibres and resin) is not included into the dataset. The user should list 1 kg of the service and 1kg of the resin and fibre INPUT for an OUTPUT of 0.86 kg of material processed.
If an activity requires 1 kg of infused product, the user should list (i) 1/0.86 = 1.16 kg of the service and 1.16 kg of the resin/fibres type processed.

'titanium' is a metal. It is a chemical element and a transition metal with a silver colour known for its high strength-to-weight ratio. It is mainly produced via the Kroll process, where titanium dioxide is transformed to titanium tetrachloride through the addition of petroleum coke and chlorine (chlorination and purification process) and then reduced to pure titanium metal by adding magnesium (vacuum distillation process). It can be used in the following applications and/or processes:  as an alloying element and milled products used in the industrial and aerospace sectors.

The seed produced at the farm is transported to the processing centre, treated (pre-cleaning, cleaning, eventually drying, chemical dressing (for integrated production) and bag filling), stored and afterwards transported to the regional storage centre.

'magnesium oxide' is a metal. It is white hygroscopic solid mineral, that forms colourless, green or brown crystals. Magnesium is an alkaline earth metal. It is a direct product from caustic magnesium obtained by mining magnesite. It can be used in the following applications and/or processes: as refractory material in the steel industry, other forms of magnesium oxide  include calcinated material (caustic magnesia), which is used for agriculture, as well as the pulp and paper and the building industry, and fused magnesia.

This service is to be used only for high-alloyed chromium steel. The metal input is not included in this dataset. Thus, this service should be used along with 1 kg of chromium steel. The exterior finish of rolled chromium steel is very desirable when aesthetics and visual appeal are a priority. Thus, it used in applications like strips, bars, rods, home appliances, roof and wall systems, metal furniture, aerospace structural members, etc.

activity_name: market for chromium steel removed by turning, primarily dressing, conventional
reference_product_name: chromium steel removed by turning, primarily dressing, conventional
product_information: This is delivering the service of 'chromium steel removed by turning, primarily dressing, conventional'. Turning is a chipping process where the piece of material is rotating while the cutting tool is not. It can be applied to both inside and outside of the piece to be machined and it is normally used to produce cylindrical shapes. It is performed in metals, wood and plastic materials. When the process is performed with dressing operation, then only minor amounts of materials are removed to produce the exact dimensions and smooth surface. The process is conventional, meaning that it is controlled manually and needs constant supervision. This dataset represents the turning of 1 kg of chromium steel. The service includes materials input, production infrastructure, machinery and electricity consumption. Degreasing is not included and has to be added if necessary.

activity_name: market for steel removed by drilling, computer numerical controlled
reference_product_name: steel removed by drilling, computer numerical controlled
product_information: This is delivering the service of 'steel removed by drilling, computer numerical controlled'. Drilling uses a rotating cutting tool (the drill bit) to remove material from the work piece and it predominately uses the front end for cutting. It is applied for shapes like circular cavity or holes. The process is conventional, meaning that it is controlled manually and needs constant supervision. The process is computer numerical controlled, meaning that it operates autonomously once programmed. This dataset represents the drilling of 1 kg of steel. The service includes materials input, production infrastructure, machinery and electricity consumption. Maintenance and tool (bit) replacements are not included. Degreasing is not included and has to be added if necessary.
